use_cases: 2D directional input control for creative software like drawing or design applications
Simulated game controller joystick for web-based gaming interfaces
Touch-based panning control for video editing timelines or image viewers
Audio panning or spatial positioning control in media production tools
Abstract navigation control for experimental UI interactions
ai_summary: VectorPad is a physics-based 2D directional input control with a glassmorphic dark theme. It uses framer-motion spring physics to create a fluid, responsive joystick-like experience with smooth crosshair movement, velocity-based tilt effects, and real-time X/Y coordinate readouts. Designed for creative tools, game dev, and media applications where intuitive 2D input is needed.
